title: Election event metadata
description: Metadata for a single ECI election event. The eci_event_id is the upstream slug used in result URLs (e.g. AcGenMay2026 from results.eci.gov.in/ResultAcGenMay2026/). One event spans the states it covered.

x-changelog.description: Initial schema. ECI event id, scope, body, year/month, covered states, poll and result dates.
Replaced optional source_url with required source field per provenance contract (CLAUDE.md §12).
Replaced single source string with sources array of {url, fetched_at} per ADR-0002. Empty array means hand-authored.

sources.description: Provenance per CLAUDE.md §12 / ADR-0002. Each entry is one upstream URL plus the timestamp our pipeline fetched it. An empty array signals hand-authored content.

eci_event_id.description: ECI URL slug for this event (e.g. AcGenMay2026, GeneralElection2024).

scope.description: general = nationwide simultaneous; state = single-state general; by_election = mid-term seat(s).

body.description: AC = Legislative Assembly. PC = Lok Sabha.

states.description: ECI state codes covered by this event.
